explanation: This property states that only when the system is in PCV mode, a new breathing cycle (breathingCycleStart) must be initiated immediately whenever a previous breathing cycle is over (breathingCycleDone) OR a patient requests a new cycle during the expiratory phase (patientBreathingRequest & expiratoryPhase). This directly translates the two disjunctive conditions for initiating a new cycle under the specified mode.
decision2_substring: either after a breathing cycle is over, or by patient request during expiration
decision3_substring: a new breathing cycle shall be initiated
output_structured_natural_language: only while PCVMode, whenever breathingCycleDone | (patientBreathingRequest & expiratoryPhase), immediately satisfy breathingCycleStart
